pages.text: I’m invited to my friend’s party. Hooray! I get to dress up and wear something fun. Hmmm …
Or maybe even an I’ve always wanted to orange dress like carrot a superhero and save the day. CRUNCH Zoom! Zap! CRUNCH Kapow! CRUNCH
But I’d also like to be a fluffy bunny with soft ears and a wiggly nose. H o p o. hp
Or maybe even a very orange carrot. Crunch. Crunch. Crunch.
I could dress like a birthday cake. Yummmm.
Or I could pretend to be a great, big whale. Sploosh splash.
It would also be fun to dress up like a leaping, twirling dancer. Wheeeeeee!
Or I could go as a fart and be all loud and stinky. Pfffffffft!
But I also really love monsters. Roar!
How will I choose what to be?
Iknow! I’ll go as a superhero-bunny- carrot-birthday cake-whale- dancer-fart-monster!
